title: Automations from the My Work page
excerpt: Automations like weekly reports from the information listed in the My Work page

posts.author: bcato (Bianca Cato)
posts.cookedHtml: Automations like weekly reports from the information listed in the My Work page

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Wouldn’t that be nice! I’ve been looking for the same thing and found that Screenful Analytics & Reports, a third-party app in the monday marketplace, can handle this. We use it to get a weekly snapshot of planned work, in-progress tasks, stuck items, and overdue activities. I’ve got one built for each team member and they are scheduled to send out every monday morning.
